since_last: 25% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.19%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.90% · BTC -1.40% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 -1.76%. 25% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.19%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.19%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.22%
cards.body: Leaders: PANW +2.76%, ZS +2.51%, NET +2.08%, CSCO +1.91%, CRWD +1.85%. Laggards: ISRG -12.22%, SPCX -5.79%, PUBM -5.72%, META -5.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.79% at $123.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
